seo.title: About PDFTool.work - Browser-based PDF tools
seo.description: Learn about PDFTool.work, a browser-based PDF utility site for everyday documents, study material, and upload preparation.

lead: We make common PDF tasks clearer, lighter, and practical for browser-based work.

strings.heroLead: PDFTool.work is built for everyday office work, study material, application packets, and lightweight document cleanup. The goal is to make common PDF operations clear, understandable, and quick to start.
strings.missionTitle: Designed for real one-off PDF tasks
strings.missionLead: Many people only need to shrink a document, combine a few files, remove blank pages, or turn images into a PDF. The site is organized around those high-frequency jobs.
strings.principleClarityText: Each tool aims to provide a clear entry point, visible status, and reminders to review the result.
strings.principleLocalText: Tools prioritize browser-side reading of selected PDF contents and result generation, reducing unnecessary server upload flows.
strings.principleHonestText: Compression results, processing time, and stability can depend on device memory, browser capability, and PDF structure.
strings.operationsIntro: PDFTool.work is based on static pages, frontend scripts, and localized content. We will continue improving multilingual pages and clearer tool guidance.
strings.operationsToolsText: The site includes upload preparation, PDF compression, merging, splitting, page management, PDF-to-image conversion, image-to-PDF conversion, rotation, and unlocking.
strings.operationsAdsText: To support maintenance of the free tools, pages may load resources such as Google Analytics and Google AdSense. Those requests do not need to read the PDF contents selected inside a tool.
strings.operationsContactText: If a page is unclear, a tool behaves unexpectedly, or you want to discuss cooperation, contact us at contact@pdftool.work.
strings.faqWhatAnswer: It is a browser-based PDF utility site for common tasks such as merging, splitting, compressing, organizing pages, and converting formats.
strings.faqContactQuestion: How can I report an issue?
strings.faqContactAnswer: Please include your browser, the tool page, the file type, and what happened, then email contact@pdftool.work.
